DISCOVERY, 612, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS OF PEACE OFFICER PERSONNEL RECORDS AND FOR EXPENSES OF MOTION OFF CALENDAR, PER MOVING PARTY LETTER 5/25/04.

DISCOVERY 612, PRESENT: PETER MALLON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, MAHMOUD NAEIMI. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HIS NOTICED DEPOSITION WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO APPEAR AT HIS DEPOSITION WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER PURSUANT TO A NOTICE OF DEPOSITION TO BE SERVED BY DEFENDANTS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $711.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
